name: Formative Memory
description: Self-optimizing memory that strengthens relevant context through use, builds associations, and consolidates during sleep.

embedding.provider.label: Embedding Provider
embedding.provider.help: Embedding provider to use. "auto" selects the best available provider based on configured API keys.

embedding.model.label: Embedding Model
embedding.model.help: Override the provider's default embedding model

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture all conversations for consolidation

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject associated memories into context

logQueries.label: Log Query Text
logQueries.help: Include raw query text in debug logs. Disabled by default for privacy — queries may contain personal data.

requireEmbedding.label: Require Embedding
requireEmbedding.help: When true (default), the plugin requires a working embedding provider. Set to false to allow BM25-only fallback.
